title: 「So + Must」句型
titleEn: Using so + must to connect a situation with a necessary action

omissions: The Important Rules explanations and most Benefits details are provided in Chinese only, although the Benefits headings are bilingual; the stored English explanations are faithful editorial translations.
The PDF title has no separate English subtitle; titleEn is an editorial translation.

formula: Reason or situation + , so + subject + must + base verb + other information

formulas.formula: Reason or situation + , so + subject + must + base verb + other information

example: Public funds are limited, so the government must spend the taxpayers’ money more wisely.
exampleZh: 公共資金有限，所以政府必須更明智地使用納稅人的金錢。

examples.en: Public funds are limited, so the government must spend the taxpayers’ money more wisely.
examples.zh: 公共資金有限，所以政府必須更明智地使用納稅人的金錢。
examples.highlight: Public funds are limited, so the government must spend the taxpayers’ money more wisely.

rules.en: The first clause states the reason or situation, such as a problem, limit, danger, rule or need.
rules.zh: 前半句說明原因或情況，交代一個問題、限制、危險、規則或需要。

rules.en: The second clause states the necessary action. Use so + subject + must + base verb to explain what must be done in that situation.
rules.zh: 後半句說明必要行動。使用 so + 主語 + must + 原形動詞，說明在這個情況下必須採取甚麼行動。
examples: The road is wet, so drivers must slow down.
道路濕滑，所以駕駛者必須減速。

rules.en: Use the base form of the verb after must.
rules.zh: must 後面使用原形動詞。

rules.en: Must expresses strong necessity and is stronger than should. Use it only when something is necessary, important, compulsory or cannot be ignored.
rules.zh: must 表示強烈的必要性，比 should 更強。只有當事情屬於必要、重要、強制或不能忽略時，才使用 must。

rules.en: Must not + base verb expresses prohibition and does not mean do not have to.
rules.zh: must not + 原形動詞 表示某件事不可以做。must not 並不等於 do not have to。
examples: Workers must not switch on the machine.
do not have to = 不一定需要做

rules.en: A comma is normally required between the two complete clauses.
rules.zh: 兩個完整句子之間通常要加逗號。
examples: The library is closing soon, so we must choose our books quickly.
圖書館快要關門，所以我們必須盡快選好書籍。

benefits.en: It makes the reason and action clear. The structure states the situation first and then the action that must be taken, so readers can understand the relationship immediately.
benefits.zh: 清楚交代原因和行動。這個句型先說明情況，再說明必須採取的行動。讀者可以立即明白兩者之間的關係。

benefits.en: It combines two ideas in one sentence, so you do not need to separate the reason and necessary action into two short sentences.
benefits.zh: 把兩個相關意思合併成一句。你不需要把原因和必要行動分成兩個短句。

benefits.en: It shows that something is necessary, not merely advisable. Must clearly marks actions connected with safety, rules, deadlines or important responsibilities.
benefits.zh: 表明事情是必要，而不只是建議。當某個行動與安全、規則、限期或重要責任有關時，must 可以清楚顯示這不是普通建議。

benefits.en: It helps you explain practical solutions. In essays, reports, discussions or presentations, you can identify a problem and then propose the action that must be taken.
benefits.zh: 幫助你提出實際解決方法。在作文、報告、討論或簡報中，你可以先指出問題，再提出必須採取的措施。

benefits.en: It gives you a useful speaking frame. When you need to explain quickly that a situation makes an action necessary, use: ________, so ________ must ________.
benefits.zh: 提供容易使用的說話框架。當你需要迅速解釋「因為有這個情況，所以必須這樣做」時，可以直接使用：________, so ________ must ________。

sourceOmissions: The Important Rules explanations and most Benefits details are provided in Chinese only, although the Benefits headings are bilingual; the stored English explanations are faithful editorial translations.
The PDF title has no separate English subtitle; titleEn is an editorial translation.

en: Rewrite each sentence using so + subject + must + base verb to show that a situation makes an action necessary.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 so + 主語 + must + 原形動詞 改寫以下句子，以表示某個情況令一項行動變得必要。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Because the road is wet, drivers have to slow down.
questions.promptZh: 由於道路濕滑，駕駛者必須減速。
questions.answer: The road is wet, so drivers must slow down.
questions.answerZh: 道路濕滑，所以駕駛者必須減速。
questions.highlight: The road is wet, so drivers must slow down.

questions.prompt: Since the library is closing soon, we have to choose our books quickly.
questions.promptZh: 由於圖書館快要關門，我們必須盡快選好書籍。
questions.answer: The library is closing soon, so we must choose our books quickly.
questions.answerZh: 圖書館快要關門，所以我們必須盡快選好書籍。
questions.highlight: The library is closing soon, so we must choose our books quickly.

questions.prompt: Mia has a fever. It is necessary for her to stay home today.
questions.promptZh: 米婭發燒。她今天有必要留在家中。
questions.answer: Mia has a fever, so she must stay home today.
questions.answerZh: 米婭發燒，所以她今天必須留在家中。
questions.highlight: Mia has a fever, so she must stay home today.

questions.prompt: Because the form is incomplete, you have to fill in the missing section.
questions.promptZh: 由於表格尚未填妥，你必須填寫遺漏的部分。
questions.answer: The form is incomplete, so you must fill in the missing section.
questions.answerZh: 表格尚未填妥，所以你必須填寫遺漏的部分。
questions.highlight: The form is incomplete, so you must fill in the missing section.

questions.prompt: Ben has an early flight, which means that he has to leave home before six.
questions.promptZh: 本要乘搭早班航班，這表示他必須在六時前離家。
questions.answer: Ben has an early flight, so he must leave home before six.
questions.answerZh: 本要乘搭早班航班，所以他必須在六時前離家。
questions.highlight: Ben has an early flight, so he must leave home before six.

questions.prompt: The classroom is too noisy. The students need to speak more quietly.
questions.promptZh: 課室太嘈吵。學生需要降低聲量。
questions.answer: The classroom is too noisy, so the students must speak more quietly.
questions.answerZh: 課室太嘈吵，所以學生必須降低聲量。
questions.highlight: The classroom is too noisy, so the students must speak more quietly.

questions.prompt: As we have no milk left, I have to go to the supermarket.
questions.promptZh: 由於家裏沒有牛奶了，我必須去超級市場。
questions.answer: We have no milk left, so I must go to the supermarket.
questions.answerZh: 家裏沒有牛奶了，所以我必須去超級市場。
questions.highlight: We have no milk left, so I must go to the supermarket.

questions.prompt: The phone battery is almost empty. You need to charge it now.
questions.promptZh: 手機電量快要耗盡。你需要立即為它充電。
questions.answer: The phone battery is almost empty, so you must charge it now.
questions.answerZh: 手機電量快要耗盡，所以你必須立即為它充電。
questions.highlight: The phone battery is almost empty, so you must charge it now.

questions.prompt: Why do workers have to wear helmets? The building site is dangerous.
questions.promptZh: 工人為甚麼必須戴上安全帽？建築地盤很危險。
questions.answer: The building site is dangerous, so workers must wear helmets.
questions.answerZh: 建築地盤很危險，所以工人必須戴上安全帽。
questions.highlight: The building site is dangerous, so workers must wear helmets.

questions.prompt: The bus service ends at midnight. We need to catch the last bus.
questions.promptZh: 巴士服務在午夜結束。我們需要趕上尾班車。
questions.answer: The bus service ends at midnight, so we must catch the last bus.
questions.answerZh: 巴士服務在午夜結束，所以我們必須趕上尾班車。

questions.prompt: Heavy rain is expected, making it necessary for the school to cancel outdoor sports.
questions.promptZh: 預計會有大雨，因此學校有必要取消戶外體育活動。
questions.answer: Heavy rain is expected, so the school must cancel outdoor sports.
questions.answerZh: 預計會有大雨，所以學校必須取消戶外體育活動。
questions.highlight: Heavy rain is expected, so the school must cancel outdoor sports.

questions.prompt: Anna wants her visa application processed today. She is required to submit all the documents before noon.
questions.promptZh: 安娜希望今天辦妥簽證申請。她必須在中午前提交所有文件。
questions.answer: Anna wants her visa application processed today, so she must submit all the documents before noon.

questions.prompt: Because the galleries are crowded, visitors are required to leave large bags at the entrance.
questions.promptZh: 由於展覽廳十分擠迫，訪客必須把大型袋子留在入口處。
questions.answer: The galleries are crowded, so visitors must leave large bags at the entrance.

questions.prompt: The food will spoil above five degrees Celsius. Staff therefore have to store it below that temperature.
questions.promptZh: 食物在五攝氏度以上會變壞。因此，職員必須把食物存放在低於這個溫度的地方。
questions.answer: The food will spoil above five degrees Celsius, so staff must store it below that temperature.
questions.answerZh: 食物在五攝氏度以上會變壞，所以職員必須把食物存放在低於這個溫度的地方。
questions.highlight: The food will spoil above five degrees Celsius, so staff must store it below that temperature.

questions.prompt: Why does Leo have to take an umbrella? The forecast says there will be heavy showers.
questions.promptZh: 里奧為甚麼必須帶雨傘？天氣預報說會有大驟雨。
questions.answer: The forecast says there will be heavy showers, so Leo must take an umbrella.
questions.answerZh: 天氣預報說會有大驟雨，所以里奧必須帶雨傘。
questions.highlight: The forecast says there will be heavy showers, so Leo must take an umbrella.

questions.prompt: Take-off can be rough. For safety, passengers are required to keep their seat belts fastened.
questions.promptZh: 起飛時可能會顛簸。為了安全，乘客必須扣好安全帶。
questions.answer: Take-off can be rough, so passengers must keep their seat belts fastened.
questions.answerZh: 起飛時可能會顛簸，所以乘客必須扣好安全帶。
questions.highlight: Take-off can be rough, so passengers must keep their seat belts fastened.

questions.prompt: There are only ten minutes left. It is essential for the team to finish the final slide now.
questions.promptZh: 只剩下十分鐘。團隊必須立即完成最後一張簡報投影片。
questions.answer: There are only ten minutes left, so the team must finish the final slide now.

questions.prompt: Because the medicine may cause sleepiness, patients have to avoid driving after taking it.
questions.promptZh: 由於藥物可能令人昏昏欲睡，病人服藥後必須避免駕駛。
questions.answer: The medicine may cause sleepiness, so patients must avoid driving after taking it.

questions.prompt: The meeting starts at nine, which means that all staff have to arrive before then.
questions.promptZh: 會議九時開始，這表示所有職員必須在九時前到達。
questions.answer: The meeting starts at nine, so all staff must arrive before then.
questions.answerZh: 會議九時開始，所以所有職員必須在九時前到達。

questions.prompt: Applications received after Friday will not be considered. Therefore, you have to send yours by Friday.
questions.promptZh: 星期五後收到的申請不會獲考慮。因此，你必須在星期五或之前遞交申請。
questions.answer: Applications received after Friday will not be considered, so you must send yours by Friday.

questions.prompt: Because the floor has just been painted, people are not allowed to walk on it.
questions.promptZh: 由於地板剛油漆好，人們不得在上面行走。
questions.answer: The floor has just been painted, so people must not walk on it.
questions.answerZh: 地板剛油漆好，所以人們不得在上面行走。

questions.prompt: The patient is allergic to penicillin. The doctor therefore has to choose another antibiotic.
questions.promptZh: 病人對青霉素過敏。因此，醫生必須選用另一種抗生素。
questions.answer: The patient is allergic to penicillin, so the doctor must choose another antibiotic.

questions.prompt: Company policy requires employees to protect the data with a password because it contains private details.
questions.promptZh: 由於資料包含私人詳情，公司政策要求僱員用密碼加以保護。
questions.answer: The data contains private details, so employees must protect it with a password.

questions.prompt: Why do residents have to boil the tap water today? A water pipe was damaged overnight.
questions.promptZh: 居民今天為甚麼必須把自來水煮沸？一條水管昨晚受損。
questions.answer: A water pipe was damaged overnight, so residents must boil the tap water today.
questions.answerZh: 一條水管昨晚受損，所以居民今天必須把自來水煮沸。
questions.highlight: A water pipe was damaged overnight, so residents must boil the tap water today.

questions.prompt: The fire exit may be needed in an emergency. It is essential to keep it clear at all times.
questions.promptZh: 緊急時可能需要使用走火通道。它必須時刻保持暢通。
questions.answer: The fire exit may be needed in an emergency, so it must be kept clear at all times.
questions.answerZh: 緊急時可能需要使用走火通道，所以它必須時刻保持暢通。
questions.highlight: The fire exit may be needed in an emergency, so it must be kept clear at all times.

questions.prompt: The machine is being repaired. Workers are prohibited from switching it on.
questions.promptZh: 機器正在維修。工人不得啟動它。
questions.answer: The machine is being repaired, so workers must not switch it on.
questions.answerZh: 機器正在維修，所以工人不得啟動它。
questions.highlight: The machine is being repaired, so workers must not switch it on.

questions.prompt: Since the village has no clinic, the local council has to arrange a weekly medical service.
questions.promptZh: 由於村裏沒有診所，地方議會必須安排每週醫療服務。
questions.answer: The village has no clinic, so the local council must arrange a weekly medical service.
questions.answerZh: 村裏沒有診所，所以地方議會必須安排每週醫療服務。
questions.highlight: The village has no clinic, so the local council must arrange a weekly medical service.

questions.prompt: The upper entrance can only be reached by stairs. Visitors with heavy luggage are required to use the ground-floor entrance.
questions.promptZh: 上層入口只能經樓梯到達。攜帶沉重行李的訪客必須使用地面層入口。
questions.answer: The upper entrance can only be reached by stairs, so visitors with heavy luggage must use the ground-floor entrance.
questions.answerZh: 上層入口只能經樓梯到達，所以攜帶沉重行李的訪客必須使用地面層入口。
questions.highlight: The upper entrance can only be reached by stairs, so visitors with heavy luggage must use the ground-floor entrance.

questions.prompt: The river level is rising quickly. Families living near the bank need to move to higher ground.
questions.promptZh: 河流水位正在迅速上升。住在河岸附近的家庭需要遷往較高地區。
questions.answer: The river level is rising quickly, so families living near the bank must move to higher ground.

questions.prompt: The school needs to protect pupils’ personal information. Therefore, teachers have to lock their screens whenever they leave their desks.
questions.promptZh: 學校需要保護學生的個人資料。因此，教師每次離開座位時都必須鎖定螢幕。
questions.answer: The school needs to protect pupils’ personal information, so teachers must lock their screens whenever they leave their desks.
questions.answerZh: 學校需要保護學生的個人資料，所以教師每次離開座位時都必須鎖定螢幕。
questions.highlight: The school needs to protect pupils’ personal information, so teachers must lock their screens whenever they leave their desks.

questions.prompt: As the train is fully booked, travellers have no choice but to reserve seats on the later service.
questions.promptZh: 由於火車已滿座，旅客只能預訂較後班次的座位。
questions.answer: The train is fully booked, so travellers must reserve seats on the later service.

questions.prompt: The dessert contains raw eggs, which makes refrigeration essential.
questions.promptZh: 甜品含有生雞蛋，因此必須冷藏。
questions.answer: The dessert contains raw eggs, so it must be kept refrigerated.

questions.prompt: Because the reservoirs are low, the new rule requires residents to limit their water use.

questions.answer: The reservoirs are low, so residents must limit their water use.

questions.prompt: Why is the technician required to back up the files first? The software update may delete local data.
questions.promptZh: 技術員為甚麼必須先備份檔案？軟件更新可能會刪除本機資料。
questions.answer: The software update may delete local data, so the technician must back up the files first.
questions.answerZh: 軟件更新可能會刪除本機資料，所以技術員必須先備份檔案。

questions.prompt: Anyone entering the laboratory is required to wear eye protection because chemicals may splash.
questions.promptZh: 由於化學品可能會濺出，任何進入實驗室的人都必須戴上護目裝備。
questions.answer: Chemicals may splash, so anyone entering the laboratory must wear eye protection.
questions.answerZh: 化學品可能會濺出，所以任何進入實驗室的人都必須戴上護目裝備。
questions.highlight: Chemicals may splash, so anyone entering the laboratory must wear eye protection.

questions.prompt: The witness has not finished speaking. The audience is not allowed to interrupt.
questions.promptZh: 證人尚未發言完畢。觀眾不得打斷。

questions.answerZh: 證人尚未發言完畢，所以觀眾不得打斷。
questions.highlight: The witness has not finished speaking, so the audience must not interrupt.

questions.prompt: The shop closes at six. To collect the repaired phone today, Carla has to arrive before closing time.
questions.promptZh: 商店六時關門。卡拉必須在關門前到達，才能在今天取回已修好的手機。
questions.answer: The shop closes at six, so Carla must arrive before closing time to collect the repaired phone today.
questions.answerZh: 商店六時關門，所以卡拉必須在關門前到達，才能在今天取回已修好的手機。

questions.prompt: The contract cannot take effect without the signatures of both directors.
questions.promptZh: 合約在欠缺兩名董事簽名的情況下不能生效。
questions.answer: The contract cannot take effect without both signatures, so both directors must sign it.
questions.answerZh: 合約在欠缺任何一方簽名的情況下不能生效，所以兩名董事都必須簽署。
questions.highlight: The contract cannot take effect without both signatures, so both directors must sign it.

questions.prompt: The road through the tunnel is one-way. Drivers using the north entrance are required to follow the marked arrows.
questions.promptZh: 隧道內的道路是單程路。從北面入口駛入的駕駛者必須跟隨標示箭嘴。
questions.answer: The road through the tunnel is one-way, so drivers using the north entrance must follow the marked arrows.
questions.answerZh: 隧道內的道路是單程路，所以從北面入口駛入的駕駛者必須跟隨標示箭嘴。
questions.highlight: The road through the tunnel is one-way, so drivers using the north entrance must follow the marked arrows.

questions.prompt: The team needs accurate results. For this reason, every member has to record the measurements in the same unit.
questions.promptZh: 團隊需要準確結果。因此，每名成員都必須用相同單位記錄測量結果。
questions.answer: The team needs accurate results, so every member must record the measurements in the same unit.
questions.answerZh: 團隊需要準確結果，所以每名成員都必須用相同單位記錄測量結果。
questions.highlight: The team needs accurate results, so every member must record the measurements in the same unit.

questions.prompt: The hospital’s emergency department is extremely busy tonight. It is therefore essential for patients with minor problems to use the out-of-hours clinic.
questions.promptZh: 醫院急症室今晚極為繁忙。因此，問題較輕微的病人必須前往夜間門診。
questions.answer: The hospital’s emergency department is extremely busy tonight, so patients with minor problems must use the out-of-hours clinic.
questions.answerZh: 醫院急症室今晚極為繁忙，所以問題較輕微的病人必須前往夜間門診。
questions.highlight: The hospital’s emergency department is extremely busy tonight, so patients with minor problems must use the out-of-hours clinic.

questions.prompt: The bridge is being inspected after storm damage. Vehicles over three tonnes are not permitted to cross it.
questions.promptZh: 大橋因風暴損壞而正在接受檢查。超過三公噸的車輛不得駛過。
questions.answer: The bridge is being inspected after storm damage, so vehicles over three tonnes must not cross it.
questions.answerZh: 大橋因風暴損壞而正在接受檢查，所以超過三公噸的車輛不得駛過。
questions.highlight: The bridge is being inspected after storm damage, so vehicles over three tonnes must not cross it.

questions.prompt: The charity has only enough food for registered families. Volunteers are required to check each name before handing out a parcel.
questions.promptZh: 慈善機構的食物只足夠已登記家庭。義工派發食物包前必須核對每個姓名。
questions.answer: The charity has only enough food for registered families, so volunteers must check each name before handing out a parcel.
questions.answerZh: 慈善機構的食物只足夠已登記家庭，所以義工派發食物包前必須核對每個姓名。
questions.highlight: The charity has only enough food for registered families, so volunteers must check each name before handing out a parcel.

questions.prompt: Several passengers need wheelchair assistance. For this reason, airline staff have to keep the front row clear until boarding is complete.
questions.promptZh: 多名乘客需要輪椅協助。因此，航空公司職員必須在登機完成前保持前排座位空置。
questions.answer: Several passengers need wheelchair assistance, so airline staff must keep the front row clear until boarding is complete.
questions.answerZh: 多名乘客需要輪椅協助，所以航空公司職員必須在登機完成前保持前排座位空置。
questions.highlight: Several passengers need wheelchair assistance, so airline staff must keep the front row clear until boarding is complete.

questions.prompt: The research includes children. Ethical guidelines require the team to obtain permission from each parent or guardian.
questions.promptZh: 研究涉及兒童。道德指引要求團隊取得每名家長或監護人的同意。
questions.answer: The research includes children, so the team must obtain permission from each parent or guardian.
questions.answerZh: 研究涉及兒童，所以團隊必須取得每名家長或監護人的同意。
questions.highlight: The research includes children, so the team must obtain permission from each parent or guardian.

questions.prompt: Why are all departments required to update the shared calendar? Several deadlines have changed, and everyone needs the same information.
questions.promptZh: 所有部門為甚麼必須更新共用日曆？多個截止日期已更改，而每個人都需要相同資料。
questions.answer: Several deadlines have changed and everyone needs the same information, so all departments must update the shared calendar.
questions.answerZh: 多個截止日期已更改，而每個人都需要相同資料，所以所有部門必須更新共用日曆。
questions.highlight: Several deadlines have changed and everyone needs the same information, so all departments must update the shared calendar.

questions.prompt: The old files contain confidential client information. Staff are strictly prohibited from throwing them into ordinary rubbish bins.
questions.promptZh: 舊檔案載有機密客戶資料。職員嚴禁把它們丟進普通垃圾桶。
questions.answer: The old files contain confidential client information, so staff must not throw them into ordinary rubbish bins.
questions.answerZh: 舊檔案載有機密客戶資料，所以職員不得把它們丟進普通垃圾桶。
questions.highlight: The old files contain confidential client information, so staff must not throw them into ordinary rubbish bins.

questions.prompt: The town expects more visitors during the festival weekend. To prevent long queues, the transport department has to add extra buses and publish the revised timetable in advance.
questions.promptZh: 小鎮預計節慶週末會有更多訪客。為免出現長隊，運輸部門必須增派巴士，並預先公布修訂時間表。
questions.answer: The town expects more visitors during the festival weekend, so the transport department must add extra buses and publish the revised timetable in advance to prevent long queues.
questions.answerZh: 小鎮預計節慶週末會有更多訪客，所以運輸部門必須增派巴士，並預先公布修訂時間表，以免出現長隊。
questions.highlight: The town expects more visitors during the festival weekend, so the transport department must add extra buses and publish the revised timetable in advance to prevent long queues.

questions.prompt: The school plans to use online examinations next term. Before that can happen, it is essential for the technical team to test the system under heavy demand.
questions.promptZh: 學校計劃下學期使用網上考試。在實行前，技術團隊必須測試系統承受大量使用的能力。
questions.answer: The school plans to use online examinations next term, so the technical team must test the system under heavy demand before then.
questions.answerZh: 學校計劃下學期使用網上考試，所以技術團隊必須在此之前測試系統承受大量使用的能力。
questions.highlight: The school plans to use online examinations next term, so the technical team must test the system under heavy demand before then.

questions.prompt: Public funds are limited, and several essential services need support. The government therefore has a duty to review every proposal carefully and spend taxpayers’ money wisely.
questions.promptZh: 公共資金有限，而多項必要服務都需要支援。因此，政府有責任仔細審視每項建議，並明智地使用納稅人的金錢。
questions.answer: Public funds are limited and several essential services need support, so the government must review every proposal carefully and spend taxpayers’ money wisely.
questions.answerZh: 公共資金有限，而多項必要服務都需要支援，所以政府必須仔細審視每項建議，並明智地使用納稅人的金錢。
questions.highlight: Public funds are limited and several essential services need support, so the government must review every proposal carefully and spend taxpayers’ money wisely.
